title: 3 Pack Flush Valve Seal Compatible with Ideal Standard Toilet Cistern, Replacement Seal & Clip for Armitage Shanks Flush Valves SV01967 SV93467 EV98167, Toilet Cistern Flush Parts
features: 【Reliable Compatibility】Our 3 pack flush valve seal is specially designed to be compatible with Ideal Standard toilet cisterns and Armitage Shanks flush valves SV01967 SV93467 EV98167. As high-quality ideal standard flush valve seal replacements, they fit securely and work as reliable toilet cistern flush parts for daily use.

【Premium Silicone Material】Made of high-quality flexible silicone, this flush valve seal delivers good durability, water resistance and stability. It maintains a long-lasting seal without easy deformation, making it a dependable replacement for your Ideal Standard toilet flush system.

【Effective Leak-Proof Design】This professionally molded flush valve seal creates a tight and secure closure to reduce water leakage in the toilet cistern. It helps restore normal flushing performance and keeps your toilet running efficiently as a practical part of toilet cistern flush parts.

【Complete with Replacement Clip】Each set comes with a matching installation clip, providing everything you need for a full replacement. The included clip helps ensure stable installation, making this ideal standard flush valve seal set more convenient and practical for home use.

【Easy DIY Installation】No tools or professional skills are needed to install this flush valve seal. The user-friendly design allows for quick replacement, helping you maintain your Ideal Standard toilet cistern with minimal effort and cost.
description: This 3 Pack Flush Valve Seal is designed as a practical replacement for Ideal Standard toilet cisterns, working as high-quality ideal standard flush valve seal and reliable toilet cistern flush parts. Compatible with Armitage Shanks flush valves SV01967, SV93467 and EV98167, this flush valve seal and matching clip set ensures stable installation and long-lasting performance. Made of durable, flexible material, it provides a tight seal to prevent water leakage and restore normal flushing function. The complete set offers great value for daily maintenance and repair, serving as a cost-effective solution for your Ideal Standard toilet system.
